svg.text: Identify the day type before your first trade

g.text: Where did price open relative to
Narrow IB → 1x extension → secondary balance zone → second trending leg
= Open Test Drive (liquidity grab then drive)
Professional traders do not trade every day the same way.
Day type determines which playbook to execute.
By 10:30 AM, use IB width + opening type to identify the probable day type.
Update as session develops based on extension acceptance and profile shape.
Identify opening type by 9:50 AM • Classify day type by 10:30 AM • Confirm by 12:00 PM profile shape
